# CoffeeRepository

> **Service Layer**

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/repository/coffee-repository.ts:65](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/repository/coffee-repository.ts#L65)

Effect [Context.Tag](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) that identifies the
[CoffeeRepositoryShape](../interfaces/CoffeeRepositoryShape.md) service in the dependency graph.

## Remarks

Registered under the string identifier `"CoffeeRepository"`.  Consumer
code yields this tag inside an [Effect.gen](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) block to obtain the
repository implementation provided by the current [Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)
(e.g. [InMemoryCoffeeRepository](../variables/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md)).

## Example

```ts
const program = Effect.gen(function* () {
  const repo = yield* CoffeeRepository;
  const coffees = yield* repo.findAll;
});
```

## Extends

- [`TagClassShape`](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)<`"CoffeeRepository"`, [`CoffeeRepositoryShape`](../interfaces/CoffeeRepositoryShape.md), `this`>
